coderunner.clearPreviousOutput.title: Clear Previous Output
coderunner.clearPreviousOutput.description: Whether to clear previous output before each run.

coderunner.saveFileBeforeRun.title: Save File Before Run
coderunner.saveFileBeforeRun.description: Automatically save the active file before running.

coderunner.runInTerminal.title: Run In Terminal
coderunner.runInTerminal.description: Whether to run code in Integrated Terminal instead of Output panel (Allows user input).
